column6: Isolation of the initial pull movement.
Primary vertical pull. Drive elbows down. Load with plates on the dip belt once bodyweight exceeds 10 reps.
Heavy horizontal pull replacing the T-bar machine. Straddle the bar with the V-handle under the sleeve; hinge and keep the spine neutral.
column7: Brace hard — this version is not chest-supported.

column6: Pull to hip. Deep stretch at the front.
Rear-delt fly with constant tension replacing the pec deck. Cross the cables and pull out and back.
Lie prone on the incline bench between the low pulleys with D-handles. Focus on mid-trap retraction not just elevation.
Face away from the pulley with the arm behind the body — the biceps loaded at maximal length with constant cable tension. Last set: stretched-position partials after failure.
Neutral grip on the rope. Brachialis and forearm focus.
Anti-lateral-flexion: stack hips; straight line head to heel.
Rotation: rotate from the ribcage; keep the chest tall.
Metabolic finisher: hip-hinge snap; glutes drive the bell.
